name: add_cron_job
avoid: do not run overlapping job instances
brief_template:
To add a scheduled/cron job:
1. Define schedule (cron expression or interval)
2. Use scheduler: node-cron, APScheduler, Sidekiq, or Kubernetes CronJob
3. Implement locking to prevent overlapping runs
4. Log start/end with duration
5. Handle errors: retry with exponential backoff or dead-letter queue
6. Add monitoring alert if job fails N consecutive times
7. Store last-run timestamp for visibility
